headline: Edna’s Margarita Mix Returns to Costco Wholesale - Better Than Ever
summary: EDMONTON, Alberta, April 09, 2026--Edna’s Non-Alcoholic Cocktail Co., a leading non-alcoholic beverage company in North America, is pleased to announce that its popular Margarita Mix is now available once again at Costco Wholesale (Nasdaq:COST) locations across Western Canada, arriving in stores this week just in time for the spring and summer entertaining season.

headline: PepsiCo (PEP) Sets Up for a Tactical Bounce into Q1 Earnings
summary: PepsiCo (PEP) is setting up for a potential tactical bounce into its Q1 earnings, supported by improving momentum and a more favorable near-term setup. The company is set to report its Q1 2026 results on April 16.
